goals.title: Do not modify local experiments/grokking/.
goals.evidence: No writes under local experiments/grokking during redteam run; new wrappers live in .omx/ultragoal and outputs target experiments/results/ultragoal_20260619_redteam/.

goals.title: New experiment outputs must use fresh namespace experiments/results/u...
goals.objective: New experiment outputs must use fresh namespace experiments/results/ultragoal_20260619_redteam/.
goals.evidence: Created and used fresh namespace experiments/results/ultragoal_20260619_redteam/ for B/E1/E2/A redteam outputs.

goals.title: Previous outputs under experiments/results/ultragoal_20260619_fullatt...
goals.objective: Previous outputs under experiments/results/ultragoal_20260619_fullattack/ may be read but not treated as new outputs.
goals.evidence: Fullattack outputs read only for statistical/provenance audit; redteam scripts write only to ultragoal_20260619_redteam.

goals.title: All papers/figs/*.png must remain referenced in LaTeX PDFs; no missin...
goals.objective: All papers/figs/*.png must remain referenced in LaTeX PDFs; no missing or unused figures.
goals.evidence: Final redteam paper_integrity_gate passes: all A/B/C/E1/E2 PDFs compile, figs_total=37, figs_used=37, unused=[], missing_total=0.

goals.title: Tables must remain native LaTeX table/tabular, not images or markdown.
goals.objective: Tables must remain native LaTeX table/tabular, not images or markdown.
goals.evidence: Visual hardening report confirms native tables: A 2/2, B 2/2, C 3/3, E1 2/2, E2 2/2 table/tabular counts and zero markdown-like table lines.

goals.title: Figures must render into PDFs with matching page/figure sizes; no ove...
goals.objective: Figures must render into PDFs with matching page/figure sizes; no overlap; keep existing >=0.5 scale gate and add a >=0.6 warning/hardening report.
goals.evidence: Figure hardening complete: hard 0.5 scale gate risk_count=0; figure optimization reduced 0.6 warning count from 6 to 2; contacts/grayscale contacts regenerated; remaining 0.6 warnings documented for very wide multipanel figures.

goals.title: Persist visual verdict JSON to .omx/state/papers-visual/ralph-progres...
goals.objective: Persist visual verdict JSON to .omx/state/papers-visual/ralph-progress.json for this redteam iteration.
goals.evidence: Persisted redteam final visual verdict to .omx/state/papers-visual/ralph-progress.json with score 94 pass-with-warnings and hard 0.5 scale pass.

goals.title: Use local RTX 5090 and remote dl4080 RTX 4080 where safe; commands mu...
goals.objective: Use local RTX 5090 and remote dl4080 RTX 4080 where safe; commands must be resumable and evidence-backed.
goals.evidence: Local RTX 5090 used for B bridge and A LMC; remote dl4080 RTX 4080 used for E1 real-text seeds and E2 positive rescue via tmux; logs under logs/ug_red_*.log.

goals.title: Avoid inflated claims; negative/partial results must become boundarie...
goals.objective: Avoid inflated claims; negative/partial results must become boundaries or claim reductions.
goals.evidence: Papers updated to lower/clarify claims: E2 oracle not positive control and trained positive absent; B/E1 scale wording narrowed; A route descriptive not causal; C selected scale sensitivity preserved; negative/partial results kept as boundaries.

goals.title: Final story must run targeted verification, ai-slop-cleaner, rerun ve...
goals.objective: Final story must run targeted verification, ai-slop-cleaner, rerun verification, independent code-reviewer APPROVE plus architect CLEAR, then update Codex goal complete and checkpoint with quality gate JSON.

goals.title: Create no-GPU statistical/provenance package over fullattack and redt...
goals.objective: Create no-GPU statistical/provenance package over fullattack and redteam outputs: manifest with hashes/commands/seeds/status; CI/effect sizes/failure/divergence rates; Clopper-Pearson upper bounds for 0-success E2; table-ready JSON/LaTeX snippets.
goals.evidence: Created statistical/provenance package: redteam_manifest.json, redteam_statistical_audit.md, B/A/C/E1/E2 stats JSON under .omx/ultragoal_redteam_20260619/evidence. Includes hashes, status, CI summaries, nonfinite/divergence counts, E1 threshold sensitivity, and E2 0/17 upper95=0.162.

goals.title: Visual/LaTeX hardening: run current integrity and scale gates; add 0....
goals.objective: Visual/LaTeX hardening: run current integrity and scale gates; add 0.6 warning gate; grep current main logs for warnings; grayscale/contact/OCR-style or image-size readability report where possible; ensure tables native.
goals.evidence: Visual/LaTeX hardening artifacts created: verify-integrity-after-figopt, verify-scale-0p5-after-figopt, verify-scale-0p6-after-figopt, verify-contacts-after-figopt, visual-hardening-report-final.json, grayscale contacts.

goals.title: Textual category fixes:
goals.objective:
Textual category fixes:
E2: exact Bellman oracle must be called oracle/solved-reference control, not positive control; trained positive control remains absent unless new training succeeds.
B: main EoS section must mention 36-cell neighbor audit; avoid universal law.
E1/B scale wording should be selected bridge/audit where evidence is narrow.
A route wording must remain descriptive signature, not causal mechanism.
C should keep selected scale audit and optimizer/seed sensitivity.
goals.evidence: Applied textual category fixes in papers/A/B/E1/E2 and preserved C sensitivity wording: E2 oracle/solved-reference not positive control; B main EoS paragraph includes 36-cell plus redteam 24-cell audits; E1 real-text bridge wording lowered; A title/synthesis make route descriptive signature.

goals.title: B low-cost experiment: run EoS LR bridge in fresh namespace for lr 0....
goals.objective: B low-cost experiment: run EoS LR bridge in fresh namespace for lr 0.025 and 0.05, CE/MSE/logit-MSE if script supports, seeds 0-5; summarize finite/divergence/test accuracy with CI. If logit-MSE unsupported, document and run supported losses only.
goals.evidence: B redteam EoS bridge completed 24 cells in experiments/results/ultragoal_20260619_redteam/b_eos_bridge: lr 0.025/0.05, CE/MSE, seeds 0-5; CE finite 12/12; MSE nonfinite 3/6 at 0.025 and 6/6 at 0.05; logit-MSE unsupported by eos_tiny train.py and documented by scope.

goals.title: A LMC: at minimum finish/resume one additional Muon short-audit seed...
goals.objective: A LMC: at minimum finish/resume one additional Muon short-audit seed or run a bounded replacement under redteam namespace; if time allows expand Muon seeds to n>=3. Preserve incomplete evidence; do not modify experiments/grokking/.
goals.evidence: A redteam LMC short audit completed one additional Muon seed 11 in fresh namespace a_lmc_short; combined with fullattack seed10 gives two isolated short-audit seeds at spawn 0/50/100, both with k_star absent; no local experiments/grokking writes.

goals.title: E1: run real-text 10M seeds 2-3 if data/scripts available; summarize...
goals.objective: E1: run real-text 10M seeds 2-3 if data/scripts available; summarize R_free stability and threshold sensitivity 0.02/0.05/0.1.
goals.evidence: E1 real-text 10M seeds 2-3 completed on remote 4080 and pulled locally; together with fullattack seed1, all three 10M seeds have R_free=4 at 0.05; threshold sensitivity recorded at 0.02/0.05/0.1 in redteam_e1_manifest.json.

goals.title: E2: run trainable positive rescue (wide/wide2 if supported, or a simp...
goals.objective: E2: run trainable positive rescue (wide/wide2 if supported, or a simple supervised Bellman-target sanity if discoverable) in fresh namespace; if still failed, explicitly strengthen non-adjudicable wording.
goals.evidence: E2 wide trainable-positive rescue completed 3 cells on remote 4080 in redteam namespace; all sustain 0.7 but none sustain 0.8, best max 0.754, status positive_control_not_yet_passed; paper narrowed to oracle solved-reference plus absent trained positive.

goals.title: C: no mandatory long GPU unless resources permit; at least generate s...
goals.objective: C: no mandatory long GPU unless resources permit; at least generate statistical framing for existing 8-cell scale audit and optionally queue two-layer continuations only if safe.
goals.evidence: C redteam work kept to statistical framing of existing 8-cell scale audit; redteam_c_scale_stats.json summarizes seed/optimizer-sensitive scale boundary; no long C GPU run launched because A/E1/E2/B were higher ROI.

goals.title: Update papers A/B/C/E1/E2 with bounded statistics/manifest evidence a...
goals.objective: Update papers A/B/C/E1/E2 with bounded statistics/manifest evidence and textual category fixes; all tables native LaTeX.
goals.evidence: Updated papers A/B/C/E1/E2 with bounded redteam evidence and textual category fixes; tables remained native LaTeX; final integrity and scale gates pass.

plan.codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
